steps.title: Recognize the y-intercept in the linear function
steps.content: In the function $f(x) = 39 - 0.18x$, the constant 39 is the y-intercept — the value of $f(x)$ when $x = 0$.

steps.title: Evaluate at the start of the experiment
steps.content:
Since $x$ represents days after the start, $x = 0$ corresponds to the beginning of the experiment. At this point:
$$f(0) = 39 - 0.18(0) = 39 \text{ cm}$$
So 39 cm is the height of the fluid at the start. That matches choice A — A is correct.
